title: Input Group
description: Groups inputs with leading or trailing add-ons.

manual.title: Add utility function
manual.description: Create a cn utility function if you don't have one already.

examples.title: Default
Trailing Addon
examples.description: Use position="right" on InputGroupAddon to append a unit or label.

examples.title: With Button
examples.description: Use InputGroupButton to attach an action button to the input.
